title: Clippy: 33 missing backticks in doc comments (doc_markdown)
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

**Dimension:** Documentation & Intent
**Lint:** clippy::doc_markdown

## Violation
Identifiers, type names, and code-like tokens in doc comments are not wrapped in backticks. Pedantic clippy wants prose to cleanly distinguish code from English.

## Locations
- src/claude_credentials.rs: 75, 343
- src/hooks/mod.rs: 467
- src/modes/mod.rs: 1, 5, 503, 522 (twice), 535, 536, 688, 744, 939, 950 (twice), 958, 987, 1004
- src/pipeline.rs: 115 (twice), 430
- src/prompt.rs: 31, 575 (twice), 585 (twice), 770, 771
- src/providers/anthropic.rs: 284
- src/tui/app.rs: 25
- src/tui/mod.rs: 1057
- src/vdd/mod.rs: 884, 1032

## Mandated Refactor
Wrap every flagged token in backticks. Examples: `CamelCase` type names, `snake_case` fn names, URL-like strings, crate names. Run `cargo clippy --fix -- -W clippy::doc_markdown` for a starting point; manually verify each — some flagged "words" are English prose that happen to contain an underscore or capital letter.
